person_name: Demetrias, great-grandmother of Demetrias (Christian noblewoman, 5th century)
person_name_full: Demetrias, great-grandmother of Demetrias (Christian noblewoman, 5th century)
notes: Christian noblewoman, great-grandmother of Demetrias, described as staid and holy in Jerome's letter.

docs.title: Letter CXXX
docs.author: Jerome
docs.excerpt: That staid and holy woman was amazed when she beheld her granddaughter in so strange a dress. Her mother was completely overcome for joy. Both women could hardly believe that true which they had longed to be true.

docs.title: Letter 130
docs.author: Jerome
